clients.title: A platform designed for everyone
clients.subtitle: Whether you are an individual, a business, or a Tunisian living abroad, Juridika.tn meets your specific legal needs.

particuliers.desc: First employment contract, marriage, divorce, rental disputes, inheritance. Access legal expertise without traditional barriers.

trust.title: Trust as a foundation
trust.subtitle: The legal sector demands absolute trust. Our verification process ensures that every professional on Juridika is certified, compliant, and trustworthy.
trust.cardDesc: Every registered lawyer is verified through the National Bar Association of Tunisia records before their profile is activated.

step1.title: ONAT verification
step1.desc: Bar card, diploma and license checked before any profile activation.

step2.title: Regular review
step2.desc: Periodic document updates to ensure every lawyer is still practising.

step3.title: Rapid reporting
step3.desc: Any reported issue is handled within 24h. Non-compliant profiles are suspended immediately.

pricing.title: Grow your practice with Juridika
pricing.subtitle: No commission on your fees. A fixed subscription. A verified professional showcase and a collaboration network among colleagues.
pricing.trial: 14-day free trial — no credit card required. After the trial, the account automatically switches to the Free plan if no subscription is taken.

processus.title: Book a consultation in 5 simple steps
processus.subtitle: A clear, transparent process designed to respect your time and confidentiality.

step1.title: Create your profile
step1.desc: Name, email, phone, preferred language and consents. Less than 3 minutes.

step2.title: Search
step2.desc: Filter by specialty, governorate and language. All results are verified.

step3.title: Choose
step3.desc: Neutral sorting by availability and proximity. No lawyer pays to appear first.

step4.title: Book
step4.desc: In person, by phone or video conference. D-1 and H-3 confirmations.

step5.title: Pay directly
step5.desc: Fees paid directly to the firm. Juridika takes no commission.

items.q: Why do I need to create a profile to book?
items.a: The profile guarantees your safety and the lawyer's, enables appointment reminders, ensures traceability of exchanges, and protects the confidentiality of your information.

items.q: Does Juridika.tn take a commission on my fees?
items.a: No. No commission, ever. You pay directly to the lawyer's firm.

items.q: What is the difference between an orientation consultation and representation?
items.a: An orientation consultation helps you understand your legal situation, your rights, and the available options. Legal representation requires a separate fee agreement concluded directly with the lawyer.

items.q: How can I cancel or reschedule an appointment?
items.a: From your client space, up to 24 hours before the appointment.
Yes. All data is encrypted and stored in compliance with Tunisian data protection legislation.

items.q: I am abroad — can I consult via video conference?
items.a: Yes. Lawyers subscribed to the Professional plan offer video conference consultations.

reseauPro.title: A closed network of verified lawyers
reseauPro.subtitle: 100% professional space, invisible to clients. Reserved for Professional and Firm subscribers.

feature1.title: Case delegation
feature1.desc: Post a need — specialty, region, urgency. Available colleagues respond.

feature2.title: Hearing substitution

feature3.title: Colleagues directory
feature3.desc: Search for a colleague by specialty, region, and language. Verified directory, reserved for subscribers.

card.title: Pro Network access
card.desc: The Pro Network is a closed space, operated by Juridika.tn, reserved exclusively for subscribed lawyers.
card.note: Substitution or delegation fees are agreed directly between lawyers, outside the platform.

badge.label: THE FOUNDER BADGE
badge.description: The Founding Member badge appears on your public profile, visible to all clients who search for you. It signals your role in building access to justice in Tunisia.
badge.benefit1_desc: Your subscription rate is frozen at the founder rate, even if prices increase at the official launch. Contractual guarantee.
badge.benefit2_desc: The "Founding Member #XXXX" badge is displayed for life on your public profile. It distinguishes platform pioneers to clients.
badge.benefit3_desc: Founding members test and validate each new feature before general deployment. Your opinion shapes the product.
badge.benefit4_desc: Each member receives a founder number (#0001 to #0050). This number is permanent, linked to your account, and non-transferable.
badge.benefit5_title: Founder network — direct channel with the team
badge.benefit5_desc: Private WhatsApp/Signal channel with Jawaher Chatbri (CEO) and the product team. Bug reports, feature requests, priority support.
badge.profile_note: The badge appears on your public profile visible to all clients

founding.description: The first 50 lawyers to join Juridika.tn benefit from a permanent status, a lifetime guaranteed rate, and a professional badge visible to all clients on their profile.
founding.deadline: Offer open until April 30, 2026 or until 50 members

pricing.label: FOUNDER RATES
pricing.description: Public rates will increase at the official launch. As a founding member, your rate is contractually guaranteed, regardless of future price changes.
pricing.guarantee_desc: Your founder rate is mentioned in your subscription agreement. Juridika.tn contractually commits to never increasing your annual rate as long as you maintain your active subscription.

social.label: THEY HAVE ALREADY JOINED
social.description: Professionals from Tunis, Sousse and Sfax who chose to build the platform with us.
social.quote1: "I had been waiting for a solution like this for years. The fact that there is no commission on my fees was the decisive argument."
social.quote2: "The integrated ONAT verification in the registration process convinced me that the platform is serious about ethical compliance."
social.quote3: "I manage a firm with two partners. The Firm offer at −30% covers all three profiles — it was an obvious decision."
social.tl_title2: Founder offer closes or 50 members reached

faq.label: FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS
faq.headline: What you need to know
faq.q1: Do I have to pay now?
faq.a1: No. You reserve your spot with no payment. Payment only occurs when your account is activated at the official platform launch.
faq.a2: You will receive a confirmation email within 24 hours. Your spot is reserved as soon as you submit the form, but is definitively confirmed after your information is verified.
faq.q3: What happens if the 50 spots are filled before April 30?
faq.a3: The founder offer closes automatically once 50 members are reached. If you submit after, you will be placed on a waiting list and contacted if a spot opens up.
faq.q4: Is the −30% rate really guaranteed for life?
faq.a4: Yes. Your founder rate is explicitly mentioned in your subscription agreement. Juridika.tn contractually commits to never increasing your annual rate as long as you maintain your active subscription.
faq.q5: What proof do I need to provide for ONAT registration?
faq.a5: When activating your account, you will need to upload: your valid ONAT license, your lawyer's degree, and a professional ID photo. The verification process takes 48 working hours.
faq.q6: Can I change plans after registering as a founder?
faq.a6: Yes, you can upgrade your plan at any time. The founder discount applies to the new rate. You cannot downgrade below the plan subscribed at founder registration.
